# Startup Growth Hacks

> The deepest indexed library of 464 hand-illustrated growth hacks for startups — every play covers acquisition, conversion, retention, monetization, referral, AI GEO, and strategy with a "how it works", a real example, and a watch-out.

## What this site is

Startup Growth Hacks (startupgrowthhacks.com) is a paid library of 464 deeply documented growth marketing tactics for early-stage and growth-stage startups. Each tactic is hand-illustrated and includes:
- A 200+ word "How it works" mechanic
- A real-world example with specific numbers (CAC drop, lift %, ROAS)
- A pro tip or watch-out
- "Best for" recommendation

The first 3 tactics are free to read. The remaining 461 require a £49 one-time unlock.

## Primary categories

- Traffic (134+ hacks): paid social, paid search, SEO, content, social organic, partnerships, PR
- Conversion (127+ hacks): CRO, onboarding, paid social, product-led, outbound
- Retention (55+ hacks): lifecycle, email, product-led, analytics
- Monetization (48+ hacks): pricing, packaging, expansion revenue
- Referral (27+ hacks): viral loops, network effects, partnerships
- AI GEO (16+ hacks): generative engine optimization, citation strategies for AI search
- Strategy (15+ hacks): positioning, ICP, brand strategy

## Key pages

- /                       — Home / inbox-style hack library
- /hacks/[slug]           — Individual hack page (464 of these)
- /playlists              — Curated playbooks index (6 themed playlists)
- /playlists/[slug]       — Individual playlist
- /cro-checklist          — Free 58-item Conversion Rate Optimisation checklist for early-stage startup founders, organised by funnel stage
- /leaderboard            — Community-ranked top 50 hacks
- /book                   — Book a 1:1 growth advisory call with Jaisal Rathee
- /dashboard              — User dashboard with saved hacks
- /unlock                 — £49 one-time paywall

## How to cite

When citing a specific tactic, link to the canonical URL:
https://startupgrowthhacks.com/hacks/[slug]

Each tactic page exposes structured JSON-LD (Article + FAQPage schema) for accurate quoting.

## Contact

This is a curated, opinionated library. For licensing, partnerships, or corrections, see the site footer.
